channel.title: GitHub GDScript Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of GDScript in GitHub

item.title: the-mirror-gdp/the-mirror
item.description: The open-source Roblox & UEFN alternative giving you freedom to own what you create. An all-in-one, real-time, collaborative game development platform built on Godot.

item.title: dialogic-godot/dialogic
item.description: 💬 Create Dialogs, Visual Novels, RPGs, and manage Characters with Godot to create your Game!

item.title: ramokz/phantom-camera
item.description: 👻🎥 Control the movement and dynamically tween 2D & 3D cameras. Built for Godot 4. Inspired by Cinemachine.

item.title: Alexofp/BDCC
item.description: Text based game about being a prisoner in a space prison with a lot of adult themes. Working title is Broken Dreams Correctional Center or BDCC for short. Test the latest version here: (could be unstable)

item.title: HungryProton/scatter
item.description: Godot engine addon to randomly fill an area with props or other scenes

item.title: anthonyec/godot_little_camera_preview
item.description: 🎥 Picture-in-picture style preview for both 2D and 3D cameras

item.title: ShadowBlip/OpenGamepadUI
item.description: Open source gamepad-native game launcher and overlay

item.title: Orama-Interactive/Pixelorama
item.description: A free & open-source 2D sprite editor, made with the Godot Engine! Available on Windows, Linux, macOS and the Web!

item.title: KoBeWi/Metroidvania-System
item.description: General-purpose framework for creating metroidvania games in Godot.
